SPWI101.desc: Slippery area. Save vs. Breath or fall, unable to act 1 round.

SPWI105.desc: Cone blinds + knocks out 1d4 rounds. Save negates.

SPWI113.desc: +2 AC/saves vs evil, charm immunity. 2 rounds/level.

SPWI114.desc: AC 4 missiles, AC 2 melee. MM immunity. 5 rounds/level.

SPWI117.desc: Touch 1d8 cold, -1 STR 1 round. Save negates STR.

SPWI118.desc: Level-scaled effects. At 12+, save vs Death or die.

SPWI121.desc: Wild Mage. Casts any spell via chaos. Always Wild Surges.

SPWI122.desc: Target flees 3 rounds. Save at -1/level negates.

SPWI124.desc: Permanent familiar by alignment. Bonus HP.

SPWI213.desc: Nausea cloud. Save vs Poison or helpless.

SPWI214.desc: Webs hold creatures. Save vs Breath each round.

SPWI216.desc: Touch paralyzes 5 rounds. Save negates. Elves immune.

SPWI222.desc: Outlines 10ft, reveals invisible. Save or blind 4 rounds.

SPWI223.desc: Sleeps target <20 HP. 5 rounds. No save.

SPWI301.desc: Reveals fog of war in area. 1 round.

SPWI303.desc: 1+1/5 levels arrows, 1d6+4d6 fire each. Save half.

SPWI312.desc: Half attacks, +4 AC penalty, -2 saves. 3+1/level rounds.

SPWI316.desc: Target fights for caster 5 rounds. Save negates.

SPWI321.desc: Removes one spell protection (up to L5).

SPWI403.desc: 50% cold resist. Attackers take cold. 1 round/level.

SPWI409.desc: Area unable to act. Save negates. 5 rounds.

SPWI412.desc: Traps target 3 rounds. No act/harm. No save.

SPWI414.desc: Target becomes squirrel. Save vs Poly negates.

SPWI417.desc: 50% fire resist. Attackers take fire. 1 round/level.

SPWI418.desc: Removes one spell protection (up to L8).

SPWI419.desc: Stores 2 spells L1-2 for instant release.

SPWI422.desc: Disease -1 stats/turn. Save vs Death negates.

SPWI506.desc: Target fights for caster 1 turn/level. Save -2 negates.

SPWI507.desc: Paralyzes any creature 1 round/level. Save negates.

SPWI510.desc: Immune to one magic school. 1 turn/level.

SPWI514.desc: Removes all combat protections from target.

SPWI603.desc: Stores spell (up to L6) triggered by condition.

SPWI605.desc: 1d6/level to primary, arcs to nearby. Save half.

SPWI609.desc: Doubles attacks, +2 AC, x2 movement. No aging.

SPWI615.desc: Destroys target. Save vs Death negates.

SPWI701.desc: Save vs Death or die. If saved 2d8+1.

SPWI708.desc: Removes one spell protection. No save.

SPWI711.desc: Immune to +2 or lower weapons. 4 rounds.

SPWI712.desc: Wild Mage. Random effects on contact.

SPWI715.desc: Stores 3 spells (max L4) for instant release.

SPWI803.desc: Kills <60 HP in area. Save negates.

SPWI804.desc: Traps in maze. Duration by INT. No save.

SPWI806.desc: 60% power duplicate. Casts and uses items.

SPWI807.desc: Stores 3 spells (max L6) for instant release.

SPWI812.desc: Summons Pit Fiend. May go hostile.

SPWI905.desc: Removes ALL spell protections. No save.

SPWI906.desc: All save vs Death at -2 or die.

SPPR106.desc: Plants hold. Save vs Breath negates. 1 turn.

SPPR416.desc: +2 AC/saves vs evil for allies. 1 turn.

SPPR512.desc: Save vs Death or die. If saved 2d8+1.

SPPR708.desc: Evil: slow/stun/death by level. No save.

SPPR713.desc: 3d6 all, 6d6 undead. Undead save or destroyed.

SPPR719.desc: Good: slow/stun/death by level. No save.

_slotBaseline.description: Unique spell.ids slot IDs occupied in vanilla EET. ADD_SPELL uses these ranges (50 max per level). Mods consume remaining free slots.
_slotBaseline.source: EET install test #8 spell.ids minus ADD_SPELL.IDS entries, 2026-04-01
